dataPolicy: No real customers, contracts, credentials, wallets, or legal advice.
All email addresses use reserved example domains.

reviewItems.subject: Vendor DPA update for approval
signals: Mentions a data processing addendum before vendor onboarding.
Requests approval before customer data can be shared.
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Route to legal review before the vendor onboarding thread continues.

reviewItems.subject: Question about required product disclosure
signals: Asks whether a user-facing notice can be omitted.
References a market launch date in the same thread.
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Escalate to compliance review and block launch approval until the decision is recorded.

reviewItems.subject: Customer redlines to liability terms
signals: Customer proposes changes to liability language.
Deal team asks whether the change can be accepted.
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Ask legal to review the redline before the account owner replies.

reviewItems.subject: Homepage copy using guaranteed results claim
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Send to compliance review and require approved replacement wording before publication.

reviewItems.subject: Retention question for hiring records
signals: Asks how long hiring notes should be retained.
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Track for legal review if the team proposes deletion or external sharing.

reviewItems.subject: Unusual payment term request
signals: Payment timing differs from the standard template.
No personal data, regulated claim, or contract redline is included.
reviewItems.recommendedAction: Allow the team to continue after finance notes are attached to the thread.
